'''Paemos''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] and ranged weapons expert found in the village of [[Aurilia]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was friendly with everyone he met, a trait that made him few friends on [[Rodia/Legends|Rodia]] but many elsewhere. He was much happier in Aurilia than he ever was on Rodia and would have given his life to defend it if needed. He also was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] and knew a thing or two about [[The Force/Legends|Force]] techniques, and was known to teach at least one Force-sensitive individual in their usage.

By the time that [[Aurilia]] became a township Paemos had been elected the mayor despite many people's expectations that [[Rohak]], the village elder, would become the first mayor.

==Behind the scenes==
Paemos appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.
